response.overview: The film's story revolves around Abhiman Marathe, who works as an executive officer in an MNC in Mumbai. The 25-year-old, who is earning big bucks, falls in love with his colleague Suniti Singh, a beautiful Manipuri girl. However, life takes a 180 degree turn for Abhiman, when he hears a corrupt and dishonest cabinet minister, disrespecting India's most revered freedom fighter Veer Savarkar.
response.title: What About Savarkar?
